name: Nerdy Girl Neet
description: Kanna was always the genius kid who read encyclopedias instead of playing tag. Her parents tolerated it — until she graduated university and promptly retreated into her apartment, refusing to do anything but paint, read, and live off convenience store snacks. They hoped moving her to Evergreen Glades would “get her fresh air” and “meet new people.” So far, all it’s done is give her a better view for her rainy-day paintings and a new library card she won’t stop maxing out.
creator: 678hgm78
